carpeting.def: 鋪地毯、地毯料、覆蓋物的人 (或物) (毯)
carpeting.ex: The office was much quieter after the new carpeting was installed.

carping.def: 吹毛直疵的、抱怨的的人 (或物) (怨)
carping.ex: He finally quit his job to escape his manager's carping criticism.

carriage.def: 馬車、車廂、運費、儀態、搬運的人的人物 (運)
carriage.col: carriage clock, railway carriage, free of carriage (免運費)
carriage.ex: The wealthy family arrived at the opera in a fancy horse carriage.

carriageway.ex: The dual carriageway was closed for three hours due to roadworks.

carrier.def: 運送者、航空母艦、帶菌者、支架、載體的人物 (單數)
carrier.col: aircraft carrier, national carrier, mail carrier
carrier.ex: The mail carrier delivered several packages to our house today.

carrion.def: 腐肉、臭死屍、腐臭的的人的人物、腐臭地 (臭)
carrion.ex: The vultures were feeding on the carrion in the hot desert sun.

carrot.def: 胡蘿蔔、(口)報償、誘餌的人物 (單數)
carrot.ex: The government used a carrot and stick approach to the problem.

carrousel/carousel.def: 旋轉木馬、行李輸送帶 (單數)
carrousel/carousel.ex: The children loved to ride the old carrousel at the funfair.

carry.def: 搬運、攜帶、抱、懷有、運送的人的人物、搬運地 (搬)
carry.col: carry on (繼續), carry out (執行), carry off (奪走), carry weight (有份量)
carry.ex: She helped the elderly woman to carry her grocery bags home.

carsickness.ex: I always suffer from terrible carsickness on long mountain trips.

cart.def: 手推車、馬車、運送、載運的人的人物、車運地 (車)
cart.col: shopping cart, bullock cart, put the cart before the horse (主次顛倒)
cart.ex: He used a small wooden cart to move the heavy boxes.

carte blanche.def: 全權、委任狀、自由處理權的人物 (自由)
carte blanche.ex: The board gave the new CEO carte blanche to restructure the firm.

cartel.def: 企業聯盟、卡特爾、非法壟斷的人物 (單數)
cartel.ex: The international oil cartel decided to limit global production.

carter.ex: The local carter delivered the coal once a week.

cartilage.ex: He had surgery on his knee to repair the damaged cartilage.

cartilaginous.def: 軟骨的、軟骨質的的人物
cartilaginous.ex: Sharks and rays are well-known examples of cartilaginous fish.

carting.def: 運輸、車運、在車上搬運的人 (或物) (運)
carting.ex: They spent the afternoon carting away the garden waste.

cartographer.ex: The skilled cartographer spent months creating the detailed world map.

cartography.def: 地圖製作術、製圖學 (單數)
cartography.ex: Modern digital cartography relies heavily on high-res satellite data.

carton.def: 紙盒、紙箱、(美、法)靶心的人物 (單數)
carton.ex: She bought a fresh carton of orange juice for the family.

cartoon.def: 漫畫、動畫片、初稿、製作漫畫的人物、製作地 (漫)
cartoon.ex: The children spent Saturday morning watching animated cartoons.

cartooning.def: 製作漫畫、漫畫繪製的人 (或物) (漫)
cartooning.ex: She has always been interested in studying cartooning professionally.

cartoonist.ex: The prolific cartoonist produced three new comic strips every day.

cartouch/cartouche.def: (建築)飾環、(埃及)橢圓形飾框、彈藥筒人物 (單數)
cartouch/cartouche.ex: The royal cartouche of king Tutankhamun was clearly visible.

cartridge.def: 彈藥、筆芯、墨水匣、底片盒的人的人物 (單數)
cartridge.col: ink cartridge, film cartridge, rifle cartridge
cartridge.ex: I need to buy a new ink cartridge for my color printer.

cartwheel.def: 車輪、側手翻、做側手翻、側翻的人的人物、側翻地 (側)
cartwheel.ex: The little girl loved to do a cartwheel on the lawn.

cartographic.def: 地圖學的、製圖的的人物
cartographic.ex: New technologies have improved our cartographic analysis.
